name: fluid-lab-tools
description: Windows-side browser capture harness (real-GPU Chrome via puppeteer-core).

scripts.verify:assertions: FLUID_ASSERT_TEST_STATS='{"timing":"gpu-timestamp","frame_avg_ms":8,"p95":12,"scale_status":"ok","gpu":{"sim_ms":2,"render_ms":3}}' FLUID_ASSERT_MIN_TIMING_SOURCE=coarse-fence FLUID_ASSERT_MAX_FRAME_AVG_MS=16 FLUID_ASSERT_MAX_P95_MS=24 FLUID_ASSERT_SCALE_STATUS_OK=1 FLUID_ASSERT_REQUIRE_GPU_STATS=1 FLUID_ASSERT_MAX_GPU_SIM_MS=8 FLUID_ASSERT_MAX_GPU_RENDER_MS=8 node capture.mjs
